1901880.name: Radio Free Europa Soundtrack
1901880.description:
I developed the game, and I think Levente managed to make a soundtrack that is possibly even better than the game itself. He combined to combine a ton of genres with high-energy electronic sounds, and make a cohesive group of tracks that really crank up the intensity of your fight across the solar system.

-Scott McClusky

This DLC also includes high-resolution images of the art from the intro and ending of the game.
